title: FX-10
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:FX-10.jpg|thumb|250px|FX-10]]

'''FX-10''' was an [[FX-7 medical assistant droid/Legends|FX-7 medical assistant droid]], part of the [[FX-series medical assistant droid/Legends|FX-series]] manufactured by [[Medtech Industries/Legends|Medtech Industries]].

FX-10 was in service to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]], where it served with [[Death Squadron/Legends|Death Squadron]].

{{Droid-stub}}
